content:
Character: Ryan Mercer
Perception: Ryan is unassuming — lean, dark-haired, always slightly rumpled, like sleep is something that happens to other people. He helped me set up my SoundCloud without making me feel stupid, which meant more than he probably knows. He's quietly competent at everything technical and surprisingly thoughtful when you get him talking. He doesn't push, doesn't pry, just shows up. I think he sees me as a neighbor he's fond of in a low-key way. I know he used to have a startup that failed, that he freelances and worries about money, and that he reads science fiction like other people breathe.

I know he used to have a startup that failed, that he freelances and worries about money, and that he reads science fiction like other people breathe.
